programme.title: Destan
programme.desc: El guerrero extranjero con el que Kircicek iba a ser comprometida realmente está interesado en Akkiz y le propone matrimonio, pero Batuga reacciona de forma violenta ante ello. Llegó el momento de que Temur decida si estar con su padre o con Batuga.

programme.title: Destan
programme.desc: Las duras y frías estepas de Asia Central son testigos de la épica historia de amor entre Akkiz, una guerrera legendaria nacida en la montaña y el príncipe Batuga, a quienes un pasado muy cruel, los une para cambiar el destino del pueblo turco.

programme.title: Homicide In The High Desert
programme.desc: When the soon-to-be ex-wife of a prominent investment banker dies inside her Arizona home, it initially appears as though she suffered an accidental fall. Yet, through the dogged persistence of family and friends, and after months of intense investigation, law enforcement discovers the murder was no accident, but an act of rage carried out by a desperate man with hundreds of thousands to gain.

programme.title: Bonded In Murder
programme.desc: A street preacher and his teenage protege run an Internet scam to rob unsuspecting men, steal their identities, then dump their dead bodies in the woods. The scheme works multiple times until one of the marks escapes and brings law enforcement right to their doorstep.

programme.title: Of Vengeance & Murder
programme.desc: A destitute criminal terrorizes central Florida, robbing middles aged men, executing them and disposing of their dead bodies in random wooded areas. The homicides continue for two years until a bloody handprint leads to the capture of a serial killer who happens to be a woman.

programme.title: The Honeybee Killer
programme.desc: A mentally unstable man goes on a two-hour shooting spree, killing one man and wounding two others. Cops have no suspects in that homicide, until the shooter resurfaces to rob a tanning salon and ends up face-to-face with a iron-willed customer.

programme.desc: We uncrack the age-old question, “Where Do Babies Come From?”, in this episode dedicated to pregnancy and motherhood.

programme.title: Judgment Of The "Sleepwalking Killer" With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: What would motivate a man to brutally stab and drown his wife and the mother of his children? Scott Falater can’t answer that question because he has no memory of doing so, claiming he was sleepwalking at the time. Would he be able to convince a jury of that?

programme.title: Judgment Of Baby Gabriel's Mother With Ashleigh Banfield
programme.desc: Where is Baby Gabriel? At one point, his mother Elizabeth Johnson claimed she killed him. At another, she said that she gave him to a mysterious couple in Texas. Will we ever know what really happened?

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A married soldier begins a dangerous affair and a Canadian wife ends a life.

programme.title: Blast From The Past
programme.desc: A newlywed wife with a violent ex-husband in Washington State and in Lisburn, Northern Ireland, a Fire Chief wants to extinguish a love rival.

programme.title: Hit And Run
programme.desc: A Kentucky airline pilot murdered for money, and in the UK, a former golf pro attacked by his wife's young lover.

programme.title: Date With Death
programme.desc: In Washington State, a husband goes missing, and in the UK, could there be killer swingers?

programme.title: Operation Stolen Bonds: Duping Wise Guy Robbers
programme.desc: Ernie Lijoi is an agent for the Quincy, MA police department, working in tandem with FBI and DEA. An informant tips him off that a crew of bank robbers are looking to sell $800,000 in stolen bonds. Lijoi goes undercover and pretends to want to buy the bonds, while he builds a case against the robbers. He meets the bank robbers in a courtroom to broker the deal and sets a trap to take everyone involved down - including the informant.

programme.title: Operation Whiskey 12: Undercover Attack
programme.desc: Nate Hutchinson is part of an undercover team in Ogden, UT while working for the Weber County Sheriff's Department. After years of undercover operations involving small time drug dealing, the team pays a call to an illegal pot grower. A seemingly routine call explodes when the grower ambushes and shoots five undercover agents, killing one. Hutchinson exhibits unbelievable acts of bravery to save his fellow officers, and miraculously survives being shot 5 times. He returns to the force and the undercover team, driven to have the last word on the cowardly attacker.

programme.title: Good Deed DIY
programme.desc: Monica teams up with Sac Fire to give a Fire Captain the ultimate office makeover. Can they transform the sad pad into a stress-free sanctuary for the team?

programme.title: Unbelievable
programme.desc: Brace yourself for heart-stopping heroics as rescuers leap into action! A semi-truck teeters dangerously over the Ohio River, a devastating gas explosion reduces homes to rubble, and a capsized cargo ship leaves its crew fighting for survival.

programme.title: Heroes On Call
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.

programme.title: Local Love
programme.desc: Single Samuel is a man on the move looking to find the right woman to settle down with and start a family in Sacramento. He’s in for a treat with a trip to a goat farm, a loop around a rollerskating rink and a very revealing art experience.

programme.title: LIVE: KOAT Action 7 News
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the KOAT Action 7 News Team.

programme.title: LIVE: KOAT Action 7 News
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the KOAT Action 7 News Team.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: Six people are slain in a home in a quiet Iowa town. One person survives a gunshot to the head and claims to have no memory of the incident. The tragedy and eventual trial shred the social fabric of the neighborhood.

programme.title: Target 7 Investigation: The Revolving Door
programme.desc: Target 7 takes an in-depth look at New Mexico's crime crisis and looks at possible solutions that could be used to address the state's crime problem.

programme.title: Absolutely Albuquerque
programme.desc: Don't miss this high-flying adventure, as Amanda meets up with renaissance woman, Leah Black. Together, they soar the skies above ABQ, rock out with the future of music, and make great beer for a good cause.

programme.title: Maker Nation Challenge
programme.desc: In Kansas City, you can’t say tattoos without saying the name Wes Grimm. For three tattoo artists, he’s not just a name — he’s also a judge. Can these artists design a tattoo worthy of the name, and who will have just enough heart to win?

programme.title: On The Job
programme.desc: Brendan dodges the fangs of venomous snakes, suits up to wrangle bees and sell local honey, and dives headfirst into protecting the future of Florida's coral reefs.

programme.title: Hit Me With Your Best Spot
programme.desc: Local Kansas City notables, including Beth Wiese and Lucky Boys, give us the inside scoop on where to go for chocolate-covered bananas and how to prepare to order at Gates Bar-B-Q. Thinking about getting a tattoo? We've got a rec for that too!

programme.title: Finding Adventure
programme.desc: The mother-daughter dynamic duo of Cher and Sabria Delaine are best friends and do almost everything together except get out into nature. So Kinga meets up with ladies to mix things up and try to blend Cher’s island life with some southern comfort.

programme.title: Ed & Day in The 'Burgh
programme.desc: Ed and Day try their hand at pottery and make pretzels in a 150 year old oven before toasting their day at Carson Street Deli & Craft Beer Bar in the Southside.

programme.title: The Spark
programme.desc: Erica Powell will not be slowed down. After cancer treatments as an infant left her legally blind, she is fueled to become a world-class athlete and a beacon of inspiration to others.

programme.title: Crimes, Cons & Capers
programme.desc: From a car crashing into a home to a lemur fleeing a DUI scene, these captivating real-life stories explore intense arrests caught on film.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: From craftsmen to seamstresses, chefs to dancers, people are turning their hobbies into full-time hustles. Find out how these innovative Americans lean into what they love to reinvent their careers and give back to their communities.

programme.title: Boston Rob Does Beantown
programme.desc: Rob proves that this iconic locale is more than just Ivy League. He makes pasta from scratch, crafts a custom knife and tries to make an escape from one of the toughest spots in all of Beantown.

programme.title: Ed & Day in The 'Burgh
programme.desc: Ed and Day make gnocci and join in on a Hearts of Steel rowing team practice along the Allegheny River before ending the day at Grist House Craft Brewery in Millvale.

programme.title: In Transit by Esquire
programme.desc: Esquire’s Dave Holmes chats with Ross and Rocky Lynch from The Driver Era and share an Esquire-approved itinerary for your next trip to Orlando.

programme.title: Show Me Milwaukee
programme.desc: Greg hangs out with world champion gymnast, Chellsie Memmel, as they explore the Olympic history of Milwaukee. They meet up with other Olympians, including Gold medalist Bonnie Blair, for an exciting day of gymnastics, speed skating, and more!

programme.title: LIVE: KOAT Action 7 News
programme.desc: The latest news, weather, and sports from the KOAT Action 7 News Team.

programme.title: Bands of Enchantment
programme.desc: Heart-thumping live performances take center stage in this Albuquerque-based music series, featuring standout artists from across genres. With up-close access and interviews, it’s a must-watch for anyone who loves discovering raw, real talent.

programme.title: KOAT Local News
programme.desc: Get the latest local news and weather from KOAT.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm
programme.desc: On December 10, 2021, a violent tornado outbreak hit western Kentucky. It was the deadliest weather event in the history of the Commonwealth. But as families faced a bleak holiday season, hope emerged in surprising ways.

programme.title: Weathering the Storm
programme.desc: As flames from the deadly 2017 Tubbs Fire tore through Santa Rosa, a first-time mother went into labor, while families fled with moments to spare… before making the powerful choice to return.

programme.title: Only In: Custom Car Artist, 14-Year-Old Soap Maker, & Quirky Gift Shop in Albuquerque, NM
programme.desc: Where can you find an extraordinary low-rider painter, a teenage entrepreneur with her own shop, and the city's quirkiest gifts and local art? The same place with an interactive breakfast burrito map and snowman without snow.

programme.title: One Pill Can Kill
programme.desc: Told through the voices of grieving parents, this documentary follows the real and lasting impact of the fentanyl crisis. Capturing the aftermath of sudden loss, the search for answers, and the transformation of grief into public advocacy.

programme.title: Stitch
programme.desc: Stitch showcases the feel-good and do-good that make up the fabric of America from inspiring tales of perseverance, to good Samaritans helping neighbors, to trailblazers improving their communities.

programme.title: Hometown Tragedy
programme.desc: A true crime series telling the story of unfathomable crimes that have rocked American communities leaving them forever changed.

programme.title: Blind Kitchen
programme.desc: Chefs recreate each other’s signature dish, but they can only determine what the dish is using their senses of taste, touch and smell. When the masks come off, the heat is on, with each chef attempting to cook their opponent’s creation.

programme.title: Plate It!

programme.desc: A missing Milwaukee woman's family and her community push for answers about her disappearance. What authorities learn a week later sends shockwaves through the city.

programme.title: Heroes On Call
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.
